title: Section 3
content: (1) There shall be constituted and maintained by the Central Government a 1[an armed Force of the Union] to be called the Railway Protection Force for the better protection and security of railway property. (2) The force shall be constituted in such manner shall consist of such number of 2[superior officers subordinate officers, under officers and other enrolled members] of the Force and shall receive such pay and other renumeration as maybe prescribed.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for "a Force" (w.e.f. 20-9-1985). 2. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for "superior officers and members" (w.e.f. 20-9-1985).
